---
title: "stpolisci"
about: 
  id: heading
  template: solana
  image: images/IMG_4421.jpg
  image-width: 200px
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: e-mail
      href: mailto:sena.tanaka0210@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/stpolisci
---

:::{#heading}
I am a final year undergraduate student, majoring in political science.

- [CV](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1baKx4-ckyKL_8r8YDRuYKubxr0VdUEmH/view?usp=drive_link)

:::

:::{.callout-note}

## News

:::
